headline: How Strong Q1 Results and Bigger Buyback Plan Could Impact Arch Capital Group (ACGL) Investors
summary: In late April 2026, Arch Capital Group Ltd. reported first-quarter revenue of US$4.52 billion, with net income rising to US$1.05 billion and diluted earnings per share from continuing operations increasing to US$2.88, while also expanding its equity buyback authorization to US$6.00 billion. The combination of stronger underwriting-driven profitability, higher investment income, and an enlarged share repurchase program highlights management’s focus on earnings quality and capital...
